achievements.description: Acquire the Wire Adaptor on Dive Man's stage
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Pharaoh's Flood
achievements.description: Harden the quicksand in Pharaoh Man's stage with Rain Flush
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Desert Blackout
achievements.description: Turn off the lights in Pharaoh Man's stage with Rain Flush
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: What is a Man?
achievements.description: Beat the game as Man. All settings and cheats are allowed!
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Intergalactic Eddie
achievements.description: Find Eddie on Ring Man's stage
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: 9 Times the Charm
achievements.description: Hold 9 lives at once
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Soda Popinski's Envy
achievements.description: Hold 9 E-Tanks at once
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Lumen-ating Path
achievements.description: Reach Bright Man in his stage without turning the lights off
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Tako 'Bout Defense!
achievements.description: As Proto Man, defeat Tako Trash using only the shield [No E-Tanks]
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Wired for Victory
achievements.description: Deliver the killing blow to Wily Machine 4 with the Wire Adaptor
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: A Mega Surprise
achievements.description: On Dr. Cossack's third stage, hold on to a platform with the Wire Adaptor for as long as possible during an autoscroll section
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Drilling a New Passage
achievements.description: Use Drill Bomb on Tako Trash to vaporize his hitbox, then walk behind him
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: A Splash of Ingenuity
achievements.description: Immediately after defeating Wily Machine 4, use Rain Flush on Dr. Wily's capsule before he can fly away
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: Toad-ally Skipped
achievements.description: Use Flash Stopper to skip an Escaroo miniboss on Toad Man's stage
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge I] Bright Man
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Bright, Checkpoint 2] Defeat Bright Man damageless with Mega Man or Roll using only Rain Flush
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge II] Dive Man
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Dive, Checkpoint 2] As Mega Man, start the fight against Dive Man with full Rush Marine ammo and spend all that ammo without taking damage
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge III] Mothraya
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Cossack 1, Checkpoint 2] As Mega Man, defeat Mothraya damageless without jumping and with Full Arsenal enabled
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge IV] Cockroach Twins
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Cossack 3, Checkpoint 2] Defeat Cockroach Twins without jumping and without E-Tanks
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge V] Cossack Catcher
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Cossack 4, Checkpoint 2] As Mega Man, defeat Cossack Catcher damageless without jumping, without sliding, without E-Tanks, and with Full Arsenal enabled
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge VI] Metall Daddy
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Wily 1, Checkpoint 2] Defeat Metall Daddy damageless and without sliding
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge VII] Wily Capsule
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Wily 4, Checkpoint 0] Defeat Wily Capsule without jumping and without E-Tanks
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge VIII] Toad Man's Stage
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Toad, Checkpoint 0] With Full Arsenal enabled, reach Toad Man's boss doors without dying, without using E-Tanks, and only using the Mega Man 6 Power Adaptor
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge IX] Ring Man's Stage
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Ring, Checkpoint 0] As Mega Man or Roll, reach Ring Man's boss doors without dying, without using E-Tanks, and only using the Pharaoh Shot
achievements.author: wes

achievements.title: [Dev Team Challenge X] Drill Man's Stage
achievements.description: [FREE PLAY MODE: Drill, Checkpoint 0] With Full Arsenal enabled, reach Drill Man's boss doors without dying, without using E-Tanks, and only using the Mega Man 6 Power Adaptor
achievements.author: wes
